December 13, 2010, Hormel Foods Corporation (the Company) issued a press release announcing that its Board of Directors has authorized a two-for-one split of the Companys common stock.

October 6, 2010, MegaMex Foods LLC, a joint venture between Hormel Foods Corporation and Herdez Del Fuerte, S.A. de C.V., issued a press release announcing the closing of an agreement to acquire 100 percent of the stock of Don Miguel Foods Corp. from TSG4 L.P., a private equity fund sponsored by TSG Consumer Partners LLC, and private investors.

September 6, 2010, MegaMex Foods LLC, a joint venture between Hormel Foods Corporation and Herdez Del Fuerte, S.A. de C.V., issued a press release announcing a definitive agreement to acquire 100 percent of the stock of Don Miguel Foods Corp. from TSG4 L.P., a private equity fund sponsored by TSG Consumer Partners LLC, and private investors.
Hormel Foods Corporation (the Company) issued a press release describing certain one-time charges that the Company expects to take in the second quarter of fiscal 2010.
A copy of the release is furnished as Exhibit 99 to this Form 8-K and is incorporated herein by reference.
August 10, 2009, the Company issued a press release to provide revised earnings guidance for the fiscal 2009 full year.

Disclosure   On June 19, 2009, the Company issued a press release announcing a definitive agreement between Hormel Foods and Herdez Del Fuerte, S.A. de C.V. to form MegaMex Foods, a 50/50 joint venture to market Mexican foods in the United States.
October 20, 2008, the Company issued a press release to revise its earnings guidance for fiscal year 2008.

August 8, 2008, the Company issued a press release to announce its earnings guidance for the third quarter of fiscal 2008 ending July 27, 2008, and to provide revised earnings guidance for the fiscal 2008 full year.
Company issued a press release announcing a 23% increase to its annual dividend rate.
Disclosure On August 23, 2007, the Company issued a press release announcing the acquisition of Burke Corporation.

Company issued a press release to lower its earnings guidance for the third quarter of fiscal 2007 ending July 29, 2007, and to provide earnings guidance for the fiscal 2007 fourth quarter and full year.
Disclosure On December 18, 2006, the Company issued a press release announcing the completion of the acquisition of Provena Foods.
Company issued a press release to raise its earnings guidance for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2006 ending October 29, 2006, and to provide earnings guidance for fiscal 2007.
Disclosure   On April 3, 2006, the Company issued a press release announcing the acquisition of Valley Fresh, Inc.
Disclosure   On March 30, 2005, the Company issued a press release announcing the acquisition of Mark-Lynn Foods Inc.
Disclosure   On March 21, 2005, the Company issued a press release announcing the acquisition of Lloyds Barbeque Company.
Company issued a press release announcing the acquisition of Clougherty Packing Company.
Company issued a press release raising its earnings guidance for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2004 ending October 30, 2004.
